    Method
    Description
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setAbiVersion(byte abiVersion)
    Sets the ELF ABI version.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setEhsize(short e_ehsize)
    Sets the ELF header size value.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setEntry(long e_entry)
    Sets the ELF entry point address.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setFlags(int e_flags)
    Sets processor-specific ELF header flags.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setPhentsize(short e_phentsize)
    Sets the program header entry size value.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setShentsize(short e_shentsize)
    Sets the section header entry size value.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setVersion(int e_version)
    Sets the ELF header version field.
    ElfFile.Builder
    ElfFile.Builder.setVersion(ElfVersion version)
    Sets the ELF identification version.

    Description
